description: §17.1.1 — an element carrying `else-if=` with NO preceding `if=`/`else-if=` element at the same parent level fires E-CTRL-002. The operator condition is parenthesized per §5.2 (a bare unquoted `else-if=` condition is atomic-only), so E-ATTR-UNQUOTED-OPERATOR stays out of the picture. W-PROGRAM-001 co-fires incidentally (no `<program>` shell); not asserted.
rationale: §17.1.1 Normative Rules: an element carrying `else-if=` SHALL be immediately preceded at the same parent level by an element carrying `if=` or `else-if=`. The compiler SHALL reject any `else-if=` attribute that does not satisfy this condition (E-CTRL-002). §17 Error Code Summary + §34 both register E-CTRL-002 at severity Error.
